matching_rule: One base case matches when a promoter or gene-body variant is visible in the current sample. Three additional case families match when the whitelist mean beta, the gene-name-related mean beta, or the all-numeric mean beta resolves to low, medium, or high methylation. Variant prediction rules receive the decoded sample GT, zygosity, ALT dosage, and site REF -> ALT definition; curated allele rules take precedence only when the sample genotype carries the relevant allele dosage.
disclaimer: Predictive theses in this database are literature-guided research summaries derived from the bundled gene interpretation bundle. They are designed for exploratory synthesis in the UI and should not be treated as diagnostic or therapeutic claims.
concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a TNF inflammatory cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology and Autoimmune and inflammatory disease context, TNF-blocker pharmacology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_prediction_rules.prediction: GT-confirmed rs1800629 (TNF -308G>A) dosage suggests this sample carries the TNF prediction context described by the gene-level thesis. The variant observed in this sample suggests a TNF inflammatory cytokine signaling thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology and Autoimmune and inflammatory disease context, TNF-blocker pharmacology. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support. This specific marker is curated as TNF promoter association marker. rs1800629 (TNF -308G>A) is curated as a TNF marker for Autoimmune and inflammatory disease context, TNF-blocker pharmacology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_prediction_rules.sample_change_template: This sample matched rs1800629 (TNF -308G>A) at site definition {change} with GT {gt_raw} decoded as {genotype} ({zygosity}). Anchor the TNF prediction to genotype dosage {allele_dosage} rather than REF -> ALT presence alone. Dosage-specific conclusions should be softened when GT, depth, balance, or genotype quality are uncertain.
variant_prediction_rules.basis: Can modify or tag TNF receptor signaling, NF-kappaB activation, apoptosis/necroptosis crosstalk, inflammation, and anti-TNF pharmacology.

methylation_sources.label: Whitelist mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses the curated whitelist probes stored in the interpretation database for the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: Gene-name-related mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses rows whose gene annotation explicitly names the current gene.

methylation_sources.label: All numeric-row mean beta
methylation_sources.description: Uses every numeric beta value that survived preprocessing for the current sample.

cases.label: Gene variant found

The local TNF bundle is inflammatory cytokine signaling oriented. cases.label: Gene variant found + high whitelist mean beta
